series_metadata.series_description: All documentation relating to the implementation of the biennial budget, including: copies of Analysis of Divisional Budgets during the biennium, copies of Allotment Adjustments during the biennium and other material relating to specific budget issues during the biennium.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until stored electronically, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronically for 5 fiscal years after the close of the biennium, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
